title: Vulkan Updated
description: Vulkan renderer for 52% more performance (with shaders) than a Sodium on driver-bound systems. Zero-Bloat.
body:
### *Sodium is fast... this is faster.* [![Fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![PC](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/pc_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) [![Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) *Video by Spidfight FR*
--- ## Why Vulkan? Most optimization packs tune Minecraft's **OpenGL** renderer. **Vulkan Updated** replaces it entirely, cutting CPU overhead and boosting frame rates on hardware where drivers hold OpenGL back (older AMD, Intel iGPUs, Nvidia). > **If your GPU is the bottleneck, Vulkan makes a noticeable difference.** --- ## Requirements | | Minimum | Recommended | |---|---|---| | **GPU** | Vulkan 1.2 (GTX 900+, RX 400+, Intel Arc) | Vulkan 1.4 (GTX 1060+, RX 5000+, Arc A-series) | | **OS** | Windows 10+ / Linux (kernel 5.11+) | Windows 11 / Linux (kernel 7.1, Wayland) | | **RAM** | 4 GB | 8 GB | | **Storage** | HDD | NVMe SSD | > Check support with `vulkaninfo` (Linux) or **GPU-Z** (Windows). > On Linux, **Wayland** outperforms X11. On Windows, keep GPU drivers up to date. --- ## Included Mods
Click to view the full mod list (11 mods)
**Renderer & Shaders** - [VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) + [Beryl](https://modrinth.com/mod/beryl) *(shader support!)* **Performance Core** - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - [VMP](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) - [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) **Rendering Boost** - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)
--- ## Limitations - ~~No~~ **Shader support is here!** - Some rendering bugs depending on hardware ---
### Credits **[VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod)** and **[Beryl](https://modrinth.com/mod/beryl)** by **xCollateral** Lithium, FerriteCore, and more by **CaffeineMC** All other included mods belong to their respective authors. Thank you to every developer who made this pack possible.
